name: Dataset or service title
description: Human-readable description of the geospatial resource.
external_url: Optional public source URL, open-data page, OGC endpoint, GeoJSON, CSV, OSM changeset, or file reference.
source_type: OGC API Features | OGC WMS | OGC WFS | GeoJSON | CSV | GeoPackage | OSM changeset | Public API endpoint | Manual metadata only | Other non-Esri source
steward: Data steward, contributor, organization, community group, or individual making the submission.
contact: Optional email or website for the steward.
license: CC-BY-4.0 | CC0-1.0 | ODbL | Public Domain | Custom | Restricted | Unknown
update_frequency: Unknown | One-time | Daily | Weekly | Monthly | Quarterly | Annual | Event-driven
evidence: Explanation of source, proof-of-control, public evidence, community survey, OSM changeset, or review note.
verification_status: User-declared | Pending admin review | Pending DAO review | Community verified | Agency verified | Disputed | Rejected
